description: Compatibility notes and constraints for the Forge proving slice. Includes proving slice 01 families (drift/promotion) and execution bridge v1 families (execution_request, execution_status_event, approval_artifact).
breaking_change_policy: Any breaking change to an admitted family schema requires a new major version. v1 consumers must not be silently broken.
additional_fields_policy: Additional undeclared fields in envelope or admitted payloads are rejected in strict proving-slice mode.
dual_read_posture: Dual-read for version transitions is not active in proving slice v1. Unsupported versions are rejected.
notes: Proving slice 01 families (source_drift_finding, promotion_envelope, promotion_receipt) were admitted first.
Execution bridge v1 families (execution_request, execution_status_event, approval_artifact) admitted after proving slice 01 green.
FA Local is the canonical execution consumer for execution_request and execution_status_event.
Forge_Command is the canonical approval authority for approval_artifact.
Remaining families (verification_result, rollback_result, etc.) excluded until execution bridge v1 is proven.
